title: Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited:
Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals Advisory Limited!
